scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,agents -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "cd agents && .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:agents
